# xcforge

> xcforge is a native Swift CLI and MCP server for local iOS workflow execution, diagnosis, and evidence capture.

This file is a compact index for LLM and agent discovery.

- [Preferred full context](/llms-full.txt)

## Primary docs

- [Docs overview](/docs/): Entry point for xcforge documentation.
- [Getting started](/docs/getting-started/): Install, configure, and run first verification loops.
- [CLI command groups](/docs/guides/cli-command-groups/): Command-surface orientation by workflow area.
- [Workflow patterns](/docs/guides/workflow-patterns/): Repeatable build, test, diagnose, and simulator loops.
- [MCP server overview](/docs/reference/mcp-server-overview/): MCP identity, transport model, and capability scope.
- [MCP client configuration](/docs/reference/mcp-client-configuration/): Host-specific MCP config guidance.
- [CLI and MCP parity](/docs/reference/cli-mcp-parity/): Alignment and caveats between interfaces.
- [Proof provenance](/docs/proof-provenance/): Trust marker freshness and source reconciliation.

- [MCP client configuration source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/justinthevoid/xcforge/main/Web/src/content/docs/reference/mcp-client-configuration.mdx)
